title: Count Ways to Group Overlapping Ranges
titleCn: 统计将重叠区间合并成组的方案数

testcases.input: ranges = [[6,10],[5,15]] Output: 2 Explanation: The two ranges are overlapping, so they must be in the same group. Thus, there are two possible ways: - Put both the ranges together in group 1. - Put both the ranges together in group 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The two ranges are overlapping, so they must be in the same group. Thus, there are two possible ways: - Put both the ranges together in group 1. - Put both the ranges together in group 2.

testcases.input: ranges = [[1,3],[10,20],[2,5],[4,8]] Output: 4 Explanation: Ranges [1,3], and [2,5] are overlapping. So, they must be in the same group. Again, ranges [2,5] and [4,8] are also overlapping. So, they must also be in the same group. Thus, there are four possible ways to group them: - All the ranges in group 1. - All the ranges in group 2. - Ranges [1,3], [2,5], and [4,8] in group 1 and [10,20] in group 2. - Ranges [1,3], [2,5], and [4,8] in group 2 and [10,20] in group 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Ranges [1,3], and [2,5] are overlapping. So, they must be in the same group. Again, ranges [2,5] and [4,8] are also overlapping. So, they must also be in the same group. Thus, there are four possible ways to group them: - All the ranges in group 1. - All the ranges in group 2. - Ranges [1,3], [2,5], and [4,8] in group 1 and [10,20] in group 2. - Ranges [1,3], [2,5], and [4,8] in group 2 and [10,20] in group 1.
